name: Cream of Peanut Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and celery in butter until tender but not brown.
2. Stir in flour and blend well.
3. Add chicken broth, stirring constantly.
4. Bring to a boil; then simmer 3-5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and strain through a sieve.
6. Discard vegetables.
7. Add the last two ingredients, stirring to blend thoroughly.
8. Heat through but do not boil.
9. Garnish with chopped peanuts.
Serves 8-10
